author: y4rr
content: Done. tracing = 0.1 added to [workspace.dependencies] in /home/doll/ferrotorch/Cargo.toml between tokenizers and zip (alphabetical). Did NOT propagate tracing.workspace = true to any individual crate's [dependencies] — each Phase 2 fix dispatch adds it as part of its own work. Verification: cargo build --workspace --all-targets PASS, 22 workspace members unchanged. ~5 min wallclock.
